name: whatup
description: Dev orchestration for the WhatUp monorepo — run `npm run dev` to start everything.

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait && concurrently -k -n backend,twilio,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:twilio" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.db:purge: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U whatup -d whatup -c 'TRUNCATE messages, conversations' && (docker compose exec -T redis redis-cli FLUSHALL >/dev/null 2>&1; for q in whatup-inbound whatup-inbound.retry whatup-inbound.dlq; do docker compose exec -T rabbitmq rabbitmqctl --quiet purge_queue $q 2>/dev/null; done; true)
